title: output_style.rs: load_output_style silently swallows file-read errors — permission denied = 'no style' with no log
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Error Orchestration / Documentation and Intent. Location: src/output_style.rs:12-33 (load_output_style, read_style). Violation: Both .ok() calls discard the underlying io error. If .openclaudia/output-style.md exists but is unreadable (permission, locked file, encoding error), the function returns None and the user's style silently doesn't apply. No log, no config-validation feedback, no way to debug 'why is my output style not working?'. Mandated Refactor: Return Result<Option<String>, StyleError>. Log permission/encoding errors at WARN so they appear in the proxy log. save_output_style/clear_output_style already use Result<(), String>; load_output_style should too.
